1713390.name: Appleocalypse
1713390.description:
Deep in a forest, far away from the big city was an apple tree. From this tree spawns, well an apple. You may think this apple isn't so significant but soon you will see how something so small can change so much.

Play as an apple, in this silly and weird game, where your choices can take you far and wide! Hunt ghosts, stop a bank robbery, start a bank robbery or even change humanity itself! Or just become a delicious apple pie, the choice is yours in this 2D platformer!

- Find All 24 Abilities
- Explore and return to different areas with each new abilities
- Fight All 9 Bosses
- Discover the mysteries of Towmore Town
- Find the purpose of you existance
1713390.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
